ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states_and_union_territories" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the state or union territory */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state or union territory */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviation or code for the state or union territory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the health department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the health department */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the states_and_union_territories table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, health official) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the health_departments table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comorbidities" (
  "comorbidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the comorbidity */,
  "comorbidity_name" TEXT /* Name of the comorbidity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comorbidity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the case */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the states_and_union_territories table */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of reporting */,
  "total_confirmed" INTEGER /* Total confirmed cases including foreign nationals */,
  "cured_discharged_migrated" INTEGER /* Total cured, discharged, or migrated cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Total deaths, with an emphasis on comorbidity-related fatalities */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "reported_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_comorbidities" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the covid_cases table */,
  "comorbidity_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the comorbidities table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id", "comorbidity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_health_measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the public health measure */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the public health measure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the public health measure */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the public health measure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the public health measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_public_health_measures" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the covid_cases table */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the public_health_measures table */,
  "effectiveness" TEXT /* Effectiveness of the public health measure in controlling the spread of COVID-19 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id", "measure_id")
)
